display.purpose: Lesson and hub page titles only. Clamp max ≤ 4.8rem.

title.purpose: Lesson block headings and staff panel titles.

body.purpose: Lesson prose and UI copy at ~65ch max measure.

label.purpose: Mono uppercase kickers, breadcrumbs, status chips.

shadows.name: leaf
shadows.purpose: Skip link and nav tooltip only—ambient ink tint.

shadows.name: rule-inset
shadows.purpose: Hairline separator without full border weight.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default UI easing for color, border, and transform.

motion.name: d-handover
motion.purpose: Layout handoffs such as spine collapse.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Ink fill CTA; hover shifts to vermillion. Used for Enroll, Submit, Continue.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1A1814; color: #FBF8EF; padding: 14px 24px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #C5462E; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C5462E; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Ghost Link
components.description: Mono caps secondary action with underline on hover.
components.css: .ds-link-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4A4438; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #B5AC97; transition: color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-link-ghost:hover { color: #C5462E; border-bottom-color: #C5462E; } .ds-link-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C5462E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Elevated Card
components.description: Paper-deep panel with hairline border—hub continue, access gates, quiz wrapper.
components.html:
Continue

Pick up where you left off

Your enrollment progress is saved to this account.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FBF8EF; border: 1px solid rgba(26, 24, 20, 0.15); padding: 32px 40px; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-card-kicker { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #C5462E; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #1A1814; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.02rem; line-height: 1.62; color: #4A4438; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Staff status and metadata chip with optional sage or accent dot.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #FBF8EF; border: 1px solid #DED6C2; border-radius: 2px; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4A4438; } .ds-chip-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-chip-dot-sage { background: #5D6E4C; } .ds-chip-dot-accent { background: #C5462E; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Quiz short-answer and staff form fields on paper-deep.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; } .ds-field-label { display: block; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8C8473; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #FBF8EF; border: 1px solid rgba(26, 24, 20, 0.15); border-radius: 2px; padding: 12px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #1A1814; transition: border-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(140, 132, 115, 0.6); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #C5462E; outline: none; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C5462E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Portal Kicker
components.description: Dominant wayfinding label on lessons and hub sections.
components.css: .ds-kicker { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #C5462E; }

components.name: Lesson Callout
components.description: Note callout with ochre left rule; warning uses accent rule.
components.html: NoteYou do not need prior cryptography background for this lesson.
components.css: .ds-callout { margin: 24px 0; border-left: 2px solid #A47E2B; background: #FBF8EF; padding: 16px 20px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4A4438; } .ds-callout-note { border-left-color: #A47E2B; } .ds-callout-warning { border-left-color: #C5462E; color: #1A1814; } .ds-callout-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.58rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8C8473; }

components.name: Staff Nav Active
components.description: Staff sidebar active row: sage-soft fill + 4px sage left border.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 500; color: #4A4438; text-decoration: none; border-left: 4px solid transparent; transition: background-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: #DEE5D2; border-left-color: #5D6E4C; color: #1A1814; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #1A1814; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C5462E; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Arcademy looks like a focused technical reader and a precise authoring tool on warm editorial paper—not a consumer LMS, not a marketing site, and not a terminal emulator. Learners get Stripe Docs–like wayfinding and measure; staff get Linear-like density on the same token stack.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper canvas with ink hierarchy and one vermillion accent
Geist Sans for UI and lesson prose (Variant A default); Geist Mono for kickers, labels, and status
Tight editorial radii (2–6px); hairline borders over wide drop shadows
Reading measure ~62–68ch on lessons; single main column + separated quiz
Responsive motion with prefers-reduced-motion zeroing all decorative duration
Hub and Staff Studio share tokens; sage marks staff active nav only

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Vermillion is the only primary saturated accent on any view. It appears on kickers, links, hover fills, and emphasis—not as large background fields across the screen.

rules.name: The Warm Paper Rule
rules.body: Canvas stays warm editorial paper, not Notion-gray or terminal black. Secondary colors support reading; they do not replace the paper + ink foundation.

rules.name: The Kicker Rule
rules.body: Mono uppercase kickers carry section identity. One kicker per major region is voice; an eyebrow on every block is AI grammar.

rules.name: The Docs Body Rule
rules.body: Lesson prose stays Geist Sans until Variant B is explicitly approved. Do not introduce a reading serif without a scoped lesson-prose change.

rules.name: The No Ghost Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair border: 1px solid with a wide soft drop shadow (blur ≥ 16px) on the same element. Pick hairline border OR a tight shadow, not both as decoration.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Elevation is conveyed by paper step and border, not floating gray cards. Nested cards are forbidden.

dos: Do use Tailwind semantic tokens (text-ink, bg-paper-deep, text-accent)—never hard-coded hex in components.
Do keep one vermillion accent per view and reading measure ~62–68ch on lesson body.
Do use mono kickers for wayfinding and factual progress copy.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: zero decorative duration; never hide content behind animation gates.
Do keep staff and hub on warm paper—Linear density, not Notion-gray chrome.
donts: Don't use a terminal aesthetic—monospace-as-default UI, green-on-black, hacker cosplay.
Don't ship Notion-gray SaaS—flat anonymous gray surfaces, borderless card stacks, cold admin themes.
Don't use neon gradient tech—purple/blue hero gradients, glassmorphism, saturated campaign landing patterns.
Don't add consumer ed-tech patterns—XP, streaks, leaderboards, mascots, level up copy.
Don't use AI slop scaffolds—tracked uppercase eyebrows on every section, numbered 01/02/03 markers, identical icon-card grids, gradient text.
Don't pair 1px borders with wide soft shadows on the same card or button.
Don't add per-partner fonts or arbitrary CSS; partner branding is metadata only.
